heading: Importing motor vehicles or equipment requiring further manufacturing
label: 30145 Importing motor vehicles or equipment requiring further manufacturing
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3014515:1397(e)., , , § 108(e); added , , .Sept. 9, 1966Oct. 31, 1988Pub. L. 89–56380 Stat. 718Pub. L. 100–562, § 2(b)102 Stat. 2822In clause (2), the word “importation” is substituted for “entry” for clarity and consistency in this chapter. The words “of the incomplete motor vehicle or item of equipment” are omitted as unnecessary because of the restatement. The words “prescribed under this chapter” are substituted for “Federal” for consistency in this chapter.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3014515:1397(e)., , , § 108(e); added , , .Sept. 9, 1966Oct. 31, 1988Pub. L. 89–56380 Stat. 718Pub. L. 100–562, § 2(b)102 Stat. 2822In clause (2), the word “importation” is substituted for “entry” for clarity and consistency in this chapter. The words “of the incomplete motor vehicle or item of equipment” are omitted as unnecessary because of the restatement. The words “prescribed under this chapter” are substituted for “Federal” for consistency in this chapter.

children.text: requires further manufacturing to perform its intended function as decided under regulations prescribed by the Secretary of Transportation; and

is accompanied at the time of importation by a written statement issued by the manufacturer indicating the applicable motor vehicle safety standard prescribed under this chapter with which it does not comply.
